arts.ttl: Dunne left out of QPR side amid Sheffield United interest
arts.sum: Jimmy Dunne has been left out of the QPR side for today’s match against Millwall amid interest from Sheffield United in the defender. West London Sport revealed on Friday that Rangers have rejected an offer from the Blades for Dunne but negotiations are continuing between the clubs. arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Stefan Bajcetic Las Palmas, Tariq Lamptey to Ajax, Harvey Vale to QPR,
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Stefan Bajcetic to Las Palmas, Tariq Lamptey to Ajax and Harvey Vale to QPR.

arts.ttl: Millwall winger excited for playing opportunity in Bromley loan
arts.sum: New Bromley signing Adam Mayor is excited to get back to playing regular football again after completing a loan switch from Millwall. He told the club website: “It’s something I’ve been looking forward to for a while – to get back out on loan and to get playing again.

arts.ttl: Millwall break transfer record for winger Neghli
arts.sum: Millwall break their club record fee to sign Sparta Rotterdam winger Camiel Neghli.

arts.ttl: Millwall complete club record deal for Sparta Rotterdam winger
arts.sum: Millwall have announced the club-record signing of Sparta Rotterdam winger Camiel Neghli. Neghli – who has been capped by Algeria at youth level – made 51 appearances for Sparta, scoring 11 times and registering four assists.

arts.ttl: QPR closing in on exciting deal for Brazilian prodigy

arts.ttl: QPR reject offer from Sheffield United for Dunne
arts.sum: QPR have rejected an offer from Sheffield United for Jimmy Dunne. The defender’s contract expires this summer and he has so far not agreed a new deal. Rangers were able to keep him last summer by taking up an option to extend his contract by a year. The promotion-chasing Blades want to sign Dunne, 27, […] The post QPR reject offer from Sheffield United for Dunne appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Millwall complete permanent deal for Luke Cundle
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers confirm that they have agreed to sell midfielder Luke Cundle to Championship club Millwall.

arts.ttl: Millwall complete deal for Luke Cundle - ex-Wolves midfielder registered in time ahead of QPR clash
arts.sum: “Luke has Championship and some Premier League experience – he is a midfielder who is comfortable on the ball, is full of energy and wants to run and play forward. Millwall Football Club is delighted to announce the signing of Luke Cundle.
